source.name: Study in Japan (MEXT) — Immigration & student visas

requirements.label: Certificate of Eligibility (COE)
requirements.detail: Your school applies for a COE from Japanese immigration on your behalf; you then convert it to a visa at the embassy.

requirements.label: Admission to a Japanese institution
requirements.detail: Acceptance to a university, college or language school approved to host international students.

requirements.label: Proof of funds
requirements.detail: Show access to roughly ¥2,000,000 for a one-year programme (bank balance plus a sponsor's income evidence).

requirements.label: National Health Insurance
requirements.detail: You enrol in Japan's National Health Insurance after arrival (low monthly premium).

requirements.label: Language proof
requirements.detail: Japanese (JLPT) for Japanese-taught programmes, or IELTS/TOEFL for English-taught.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for your intended stay.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer fees or living funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you a Japanese number and data on landing.

requirements.label: Accommodation
requirements.detail: Arrange housing or a dorm early.
